originalTitle: Gatto | Teaser Trailer | In Theaters March 5, 2027
content: Ciao Gatto Watch the new teaser for Disney & Pixar's #Gatto, arriving in theaters March 5, 2027 Mark Ruffalo (“Poor Things,” “The Avengers,” “Spotlight, “Foxcatcher”) has joined the voice cast as the scrappy black cat Nero, and Laurence Fishburne (“The Matrix” trilogy, “Boyz n the Hood,” “What's Love Got to Do with It”) will voice the ruthless mob boss cat Rocco. The teaser trailer introduces Nero and Rocco as they question another cat in a funny interrogation scene. In “Gatto,” after years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city of Venice, Italy, Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to Rocco, the local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first. “Gatto” is directed by Enrico Casarosa and produced by Andrea Warren, the filmmaking team behind the Oscar®-nominated feature “Luca.” The new film releases exclusively in theaters March 5, 2027. ABOUT PIXAR ANIMATION STUDIOS Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.” SOCIAL MEDIA Facebook: @Pixar Instagram: @Pixar TikTok: @Pixar X: @Pixar YouTube: @Pixar Hashtag: #Gatto ► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Pixar videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/pixar?sub_confirmation=1 ► SUBSCRIBE to Disney+ to stream all of your favorite Pixar shows and movies: https://www.disneyplus.com/ Follow on social media to get the latest news and announcements from Pixar: TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@pixar?lang=en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pixar Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Pixar X: https://x.com/pixar Experience more stories by subscribing: @Disney @marvel @StarWars @disneyplus
chineseContent: Ciao Gatto 观看迪士尼和皮克斯出品的#Gatto 新预告片，将于 2027 年 3 月 5 日上映 马克·鲁法洛（《可怜的东西》、《复仇者联盟》、《聚光灯》、《狐狸捕手》）加入了配音演员阵容，饰演好斗的黑猫尼禄，劳伦斯·菲什伯恩（《黑客帝国》三部曲、《兜帽男孩》、《爱情该怎么做》）与它”）将为残忍的黑帮老大猫罗科配音。预告片介绍了尼禄和罗科在一个有趣的审讯场景中询问另一只猫。在“Gatto”中，在意大利威尼斯这个运河泛滥、迷信的城市里盘旋多年后，尼禄开始质疑自己是否过着正确的生活。欠当地猫科黑帮老大罗科的恩惠，尼禄发现自己陷入了两难境地，被迫建立了一段真正意想不到的友谊，最终可能会引导他实现自己的目标——除非威尼斯首先战胜了他。《加托》由恩里科·卡萨罗萨执导，由奥斯卡®提名影片《卢卡》的电影制作团队安德里亚·沃伦制作。新电影将于 2027 年 3 月 5 日在影院独家上映。 关于皮克斯动画工作室 皮克斯动画工作室是华特迪士尼公司的全资子公司，是一家荣获奥斯卡奖的电影工作室，在计算机动画艺术领域拥有世界知名的技术、创意和制作能力。这家北加州工作室制作了一些有史以来最成功和最受欢迎的动画电影，包括《玩具总动员》、《怪兽电力公司》、《汽车总动员》、《超人总动员》、《料理鼠王》、《机器人总动员》、《飞屋环游记》、《勇敢传说》、《头脑特工队》、《寻梦环游记》、《灵魂》、《变红》、《元素》和《头脑特工队2》。社交媒体 Facebook：@Pixar Instagram：@Pixar TikTok：@Pixar X：@Pixar YouTube：@Pixar 标签：#Gatto ► 订阅频道，以便在发布新的皮克斯视频时收到通知：https://www.youtube.com/pixar?s
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
